HerrOS ‚ÄĒ sizi tanńĪmayan, m…ôlumatlarńĪnńĪzńĪ satmayan, reklam g√∂st…ôrm…ôy…ôn bir Ňü…ôxsi panel t…ôtbiqidir.

Bu t…ôtbiq Ulvi Latifov t…ôr…ôfind…ôn yaradńĪlńĪb ‚ÄĒ insanlara √∂z h…ôyatlarńĪnńĪ daha Ňü√ľurlu v…ô sistemli idar…ô etm…ôkd…ô k√∂m…ôk etm…ôk m…ôqs…ôdi il…ô.

ūüí° B√ľt√ľn m…ôlumatlarńĪnńĪz yalnńĪz sizin cihazńĪnńĪzda saxlanńĪr. He√ß bir server, he√ß bir hesab, he√ß bir reklam.
ūüéĮ
Niy…ô HerrOS?
H…ôr Ňüey bir yerd…ô, internetsiz, tamamil…ô sizin
ūüďĚ
17 b√∂lm…ô ‚ÄĒ V…ôzif…ôl…ôr, maliyy…ô, kitablar, filml…ôr, seriallar, qeydl…ôr, h…ôd…ôfl…ôr, m…ôŇüql…ôr, v…ôrdiŇül…ôr, t…ôqvim, linkl…ôr, Ňüifr…ôl…ôr, Pomodoro, oyunlar, puzzle, al…ôtl…ôr, nailiyy…ôtl…ôr

ńįnternetsiz iŇül…ôyir ‚ÄĒ Bir d…ôf…ô y√ľkl…ô, h…ômiŇü…ô istifad…ô et. U√ßak rejimind…ô d…ô iŇül…ôyir.
ūüď≤
T…ôtbiq kimi quraŇüdńĪr ‚ÄĒ Brauzer menyusundan "Ana ekrana …ôlav…ô et" se√ßin, telefon t…ôtbiqi kimi a√ßńĪlńĪr.
ūüé®
7 r…ông temasńĪ ‚ÄĒ Parametrl…ôrd…ôn ist…ôdiyin g√∂r√ľn√ľŇü√ľ se√ß.
ūüďĖ
Nec…ô istifad…ô etm…ôli?
Maksimum fayda √ľ√ß√ľn bu t√∂vsiy…ôl…ôr…ô …ôm…ôl edin
1
B√∂lm…ôl…ôri se√ßin ‚ÄĒ Siz…ô lazńĪm olan b√∂lm…ôl…ôri se√ßin. HamńĪsńĪnńĪ a√ßmańüa t…ôl…ôsm…ôyin, ehtiyac olduńüu kimi …ôlav…ô edin.
2
H…ôr g√ľn 5 d…ôqiq…ô ‚ÄĒ S…ôh…ôr v…ôzif…ôl…ôrinizi, axŇüam n…ôl…ôr etdiyinizi qeyd edin. ArdńĪcńĪllńĪq vacibdir.
3
Yed…ôk alńĪn ‚ÄĒ Parametrl…ôr ‚Üí Yed…ôk Al (JSON). H…ôft…ôd…ô bir d…ôf…ô yed…ôk almańüńĪ v…ôrdiŇü edin.
4
Pomodoro il…ô √ßalńĪŇüńĪn ‚ÄĒ 25 d…ôq √ßalńĪŇüma + 5 d…ôq fasil…ô. Fokus √ľ√ß√ľn …ôla texnikadńĪr.

// ‚ēź‚ēź GLOBAL SEARCH ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź let _gsFilter='all'; // Modul aktiv deyils…ô aktivl…ôŇüdir…ôr…ôk naviqasiya et function _gsNavTo(modId, cb){ closeOv('ovSearch'); if(!S.mods.includes(modId)){ S.mods.push(modId); sv('mods',S.mods); buildNav(); renderAll(); } navTo(modId); if(cb) setTimeout(cb, 400); } function _gameEmoji(id){ const m={g2048:'ūüĒĘ',snake:'ūüźć',tetris:'ūüßĪ',mines:'ūüí£',wordle:'ūüĒ§',sudoku:'ūüĒĘ',memory:'ūüÉŹ',breakout:'ūüŹď',pong:'ūüŹł',flappy:'ūüź¶'}; return m[id]||'ūüéģ'; } function openGlobalSearch(){ document.getElementById('gs-input').value=''; document.getElementById('gs-results').innerHTML=''; _gsFilter='all'; document.querySelectorAll('#gs-filter-tabs .ftab').forEach((b,i)=>{b.classList.toggle('on',i===0);}); openOv('ovSearch'); setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('gs-input')?.focus(),200); showGsWelcome(); } function showGsWelcome(){ const el=document.getElementById('gs-results'); const recent=[ ...(S.todos.slice(0,2).map(t=>({ico:'‚úÖ',label:t.text,go:'todo'}))), ...(S.notes.slice(0,2).map(n=>({ico:'ūüďĚ',label:n.title||n.text?.slice(0,30)||'Qeyd',go:'notes'}))), ...(S.books.slice(0,1).map(b=>({ico:'ūüďö',label:b.title,go:'books'}))), ].slice(0,5); const gameChips=Object.entries(GN).map(([id,name])=>`
${_gameEmoji(id)} ${name}
`).join(''); const puzChips=PUZM.map(p=>`
${p.e} ${p.n}
`).join(''); el.innerHTML=`
ūüĒć

V…ôzif…ô, qeyd, kitab, oyun, puzzle...
H…ôr yerd…ô ‚ÄĒ aktiv olmayan b√∂lm…ôl…ôr d…ô daxil

${recent.length?`
${recent.map(r=>`
${r.ico} ${r.label}
`).join('')}
`:''}
ūüéģ Oyunlar
${gameChips}
ūüß© Puzzllar
${puzChips}
`; } function setGsFilter(f,btn){ _gsFilter=f; document.querySelectorAll('#gs-filter-tabs .ftab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on')); btn.classList.add('on'); runGlobalSearch(); } function _gsHL(text,q){ if(!q||!text)return text||''; const safe=q.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&'); return String(text).replace(new RegExp('('+safe+')','gi'),'$1'); } function runGlobalSearch(){ const q=(document.getElementById('gs-input')?.value||'').toLowerCase().trim(); const el=document.getElementById('gs-results'); if(!q){showGsWelcome();return;} const sections=[]; const f=_gsFilter; // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ B√∂lm…ôl…ôr (aktiv + qeyri-aktiv) ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='module'){ const hits=MODS.filter(m=>m.n.toLowerCase().includes(q)||m.d.toLowerCase().includes(q)||m.lb.toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüď¶ B√∂lm…ôl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.map(m=>`
${m.e}
${_gsHL(m.n,q)}
${_gsHL(m.d,q)}
${S.mods.includes(m.id)?'A√ß ‚Üí':'‚ú® Aktivl…ôŇüdir'}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Oyunlar ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='game'){ const gameEntries=Object.entries(GN).filter(([id,name])=>name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||id.toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(gameEntries.length){ sections.push(`
ūüéģ Oyunlar ${gameEntries.length}
` +gameEntries.map(([id,name])=>`
${_gameEmoji(id)}
${_gsHL(name,q)}
${(S.ghi||{})[id]?'ūüŹÜ Rekord: '+(S.ghi||{})[id]:'H…ôl…ô oynamamńĪsńĪnńĪz'}
Oyna ‚Üí
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Puzzllar ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='puzzle'){ const puzHits=PUZM.filter(p=>p.n.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.d.toLowerCase().includes(q)||p.id.toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(puzHits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüß© Puzzllar ${puzHits.length}
` +puzHits.map(p=>`
${p.e}
${_gsHL(p.n,q)}
${_gsHL(p.d,q)}${(S.phi||{})[p.id]?' ¬∑ ūüŹÜ '+(S.phi||{})[p.id]:''}
Oyna ‚Üí
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Al…ôtl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='tool'){ const hits=TOOLS.filter(t=>t.n.toLowerCase().includes(q)||t.d.toLowerCase().includes(q)||t.id.toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüĒß Al…ôtl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.map(t=>`
${t.e}
${_gsHL(t.n,q)}
${_gsHL(t.d,q)}
A√ß ‚Üí
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ V…ôzif…ôl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='todo'){ const hits=S.todos.filter(t=>t.text.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(t.cat||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
‚úÖ V…ôzif…ôl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,8).map(t=>`
${t.done?'‚úÖ':'‚¨ú'}
${_gsHL(t.text,q)}
${t.cat||''}${t.due?' ¬∑ ūüďÖ '+t.due:''}
${t.done?'TamamlandńĪ':'Aktiv'}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Qeydl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='note'){ const hits=S.notes.filter(n=>(n.title||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(n.text||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüďĚ Qeydl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(n=>`
ūüďĚ
${_gsHL(n.title||'BaŇülńĪqsńĪz',q)}
${_gsHL((n.text||'').slice(0,60),q)}
${n.tags?.length?`
${n.tags[0]}
`:''}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Kitablar ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='book'){ const hits=S.books.filter(b=>b.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(b.author||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(b.genre||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüďö Kitablar ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(b=>`
${b.emoji||'ūüďö'}
${_gsHL(b.title,q)}
${_gsHL(b.author||'',q)}${b.genre?' ¬∑ '+b.genre:''}
${{oxuyuram:'Oxuyuram',oxudum:'Oxudum',oxuyacańüam:'SiyahńĪ'}[b.status]||b.status}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Maliyy…ô ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='finance'){ const hits=S.txns.filter(t=>!t.isKassa&&!t.isKassaOut&&((t.note||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(t.cat||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||String(t.amt||'').includes(q))); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüíį Maliyy…ô ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(t=>`
${t.type==='g…ôlir'?'ūüíö':'ūüĒī'}
${_gsHL(t.note||t.cat,q)}
${t.date||''}${t.cat?' ¬∑ '+_gsHL(t.cat,q):''}
‚āľ${t.amt}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Filml…ôr & Seriallar ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='film'){ const hits=[...S.films,...(S.serials||[])].filter(f=>f.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(f.genre||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüé¨ Film & Serial ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(f=>`
${f.emoji||'ūüé¨'}
${_gsHL(f.title,q)}
${f.genre||''}${f.year?' ¬∑ '+f.year:''}
${{izl…ôdim:'ńįzl…ôdim',izl…ôyir…ôm:'ńįzl…ôyir…ôm','izl…ôy…ôc…ôy…ôm':'SiyahńĪ'}[f.status]||f.status||''}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Linkl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='link'){ const hits=S.links.filter(l=>l.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(l.url||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(l.tag||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüĒó Linkl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(l=>`
ūüĒó
${_gsHL(l.title,q)}
${_gsHL(l.url||'',q).slice(0,50)}
${l.tag?`
${l.tag}
`:''}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ H…ôd…ôfl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='goal'){ const hits=S.goals.filter(g=>g.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(g.desc||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüéĮ H…ôd…ôfl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,5).map(g=>`
ūüéĮ
${_gsHL(g.title,q)}
${g.progress||0}% tamamlandńĪ${g.due?' ¬∑ '+g.due:''}
${g.progress>=100?'‚úÖ':'ūüĒĄ'}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Hadis…ôl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='event'){ const hits=S.events.filter(e=>e.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(e.note||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüďÖ Hadis…ôl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,5).map(e=>`
ūüďÖ
${_gsHL(e.title,q)}
${e.date||''}${e.time?' ¬∑ '+e.time:''}
${e.type?`
${e.type}
`:''}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ Ňěifr…ôl…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='pass'){ const passwords=ld('passwords')||{}; const hits=Object.values(passwords).filter(p=>(p.site||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(p.user||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüĒź Ňěifr…ôl…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,5).map(p=>`
ūüĒź
${_gsHL(p.site||'',q)}
${_gsHL(p.user||'',q)}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ V…ôrdiŇül…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='habit'){ const hits=S.habits.filter(h=>(h.name||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(h.note||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(h.cat||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüĒ• V…ôrdiŇül…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(h=>`
${h.emoji||'ūüĒ•'}
${_gsHL(h.name||'',q)}
${h.cat||''}${h.note?' ¬∑ '+_gsHL(h.note.slice(0,40),q):''}
${h.cat||'V…ôrdiŇü'}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ M…ôŇüql…ôr ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='workout'){ const hits=S.workout.filter(w=>(w.type||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)||(w.note||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüŹčÔłŹ M…ôŇüql…ôr ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,6).map(w=>`
ūüŹčÔłŹ
${_gsHL(w.type||'M…ôŇüq',q)}
${w.date||''}${w.dur?' ¬∑ '+w.dur+' d…ôq':''}
${w.cal?`
${w.cal} kkal
`:''}
`).join('')); } } // ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ AlńĪŇü-veriŇü ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ if(f==='all'||f==='shop'){ const shopItems=_shopLoad(); const hits=shopItems.filter(i=>i.text.toLowerCase().includes(q)); if(hits.length){ sections.push(`
ūüõí AlńĪŇü-veriŇü ${hits.length}
` +hits.slice(0,8).map(i=>`
${i.done?'‚úÖ':'ūüõí'}
${_gsHL(i.text,q)}
AlńĪŇü-veriŇü siyahńĪsńĪ
${i.done?'‚úď AlńĪndńĪ':'G√∂zl…ônir'}
`).join('')); } } if(!sections.length){ el.innerHTML=`
ūüĒć

"${q}" √ľ√ß√ľn he√ß bir n…ôtic…ô tapńĪlmadńĪ

Sil
`; } else { el.innerHTML=sections.join(''); } } // Keyboard shortcut: / to open search document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{ if(e.key==='/'&&!e.ctrlKey&&!e.metaKey){ const tag=document.activeElement?.tagName; if(tag!=='INPUT'&&tag!=='TEXTAREA'&&tag!=='SELECT'){ e.preventDefault(); openGlobalSearch(); } } if(e.key==='Escape'){ const ov=document.getElementById('ovSearch'); if(ov?.classList.contains('on'))closeOv('ovSearch'); } }); // ‚ēź‚ēź AUTO-LOCK ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź // Tab gizl…ôn…ônd…ô v…ô ya bańülananda avtomatik kilidl…ô function triggerAutoLock(){ if(!_lockCfg) return; // Kilit qurulmayńĪbsa, he√ß n…ô etm…ô if(!S.user || !S.mods.length) return; // GiriŇü edilm…ôyibs…ô, he√ß n…ô etm…ô const cur = document.getElementById('sApp'); if(!cur || !cur.classList.contains('on')) return; // App ekranńĪ a√ßńĪq deyils…ô, he√ß n…ô etm…ô showLockScreen('unlock'); // Kilit ekranńĪnńĪ g√∂st…ôr } // ńįstifad…ô√ßi baŇüqa taba ke√ß…ônd…ô / telefonu kilidl…ôy…ônd…ô document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function(){ if(document.visibilityState === 'hidden'){ // YalnńĪz kilit bayrańüńĪnńĪ qoy, ekranńĪ g√∂st…ôrm…ô // (arxa planda barmaq izi ist…ôm…ô ‚ÄĒ bu t…ôtbiqi √∂n plana qaytarńĪr) if(_lockCfg && S.user && S.mods.length){ const cur = document.getElementById('sApp'); if(cur && cur.classList.contains('on')){ _pendingLock = true; } } } else if(document.visibilityState === 'visible'){ // ńįstifad…ô√ßi geri qayńĪdanda kilidi g√∂st…ôr if(_pendingLock){ _pendingLock = false; triggerAutoLock(); } } }); // Tab / brauzer bańülananda window.addEventListener('pagehide', function(){ if(_lockCfg && S.user && S.mods.length) _pendingLock = true; }); // ‚ēź‚ēź INIT ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź (async function(){ await loadAll(); updateLoginStreak(); S.theme=ld('theme')||null; initTheme(); loadLockCfg(); // kilidi y√ľkl…ô if(S.user && S.mods.length){ if(_lockCfg){ // Kilit aktifdirs…ô kilit ekranńĪ g√∂st…ôr showLockScreen('unlock'); } else { goScr('sApp');buildNav();renderAll();navTo('dash'); } } else if(S.user){startOnboarding();} // else: sLogin artńĪq default olaraq on-dur checkBackupReminder(); })();
